name: Add a Custom Sales Channel
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales channels are used to track the system or marketplace where an order was placed, or customer acquired. You can add a custom sales channel to track orders that are added manually, imported, or created through the Neto API."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add a custom sales channel:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Sales Orders & Invoices section click on "}, {"text": "Sales Channels", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your sales channels will display with visible/hidden statuses for customers and sales orders. When these are visible you can select them when creating an order or customer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " of your sales channel, and select the "}, {"text": "Visible in Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Visible in Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkboxes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Auto save changes to order total on status change", "bold": true}, {"text": " box if you do not want warnings when order totals change."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save & Close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your sales channel is now created, and can be assigned to sales orders and customers."}]}]
